privacy_policy.meta_description: Understand our commitment to data protection and digital sovereignty within the Sanctuary.
privacy_policy.title: Privacy Policy

content.heading: 1. Introduction
content.body: At Beach Hotel Canasvieiras, the privacy of our guests and visitors is a non-negotiable priority. This policy outlines how we collect, safeguard, and utilize your information.

content.heading: 2. Telemetry & Geolocation
content.body: Our platform employs the Heimdall Protocol to anonymize geolocation data, enabling real-time weather and timezone synchronization in the Visitor HUD. We do not store physical IP addresses in permanent databases.

content.heading: 3. Data Sovereignty
content.body: Through our private infrastructure, we ensure that guest data remains encrypted and isolated, preventing unauthorized third-party access.

terms_of_service.meta_title: Terms of Service | Beach Hotel Canasvieiras
terms_of_service.meta_description: Usage conditions and booking terms for our boutique platform and festival.
terms_of_service.title: Terms of Service

content.heading: 1. Acceptance of Terms
content.body: By accessing this digital ecosystem, you agree to comply with these terms. Our services are designed for elite hospitality management and event promotion.

content.heading: 2. Digital Assets
content.body: All software components, 3D models, and AI-generated content displayed are protected intellectual property. Misuse or attempted security breaches will be handled by our automated sentinels.
